[Home](./index.md) &gt; [pi-ws](./pi-ws.md) &gt; [PiWsConfigLoaderOptions](./pi-ws.piwsconfigloaderoptions.md)

## PiWsConfigLoaderOptions interface

Options for `loadConfig()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiWsConfigLoaderOptions
```

## Remarks

`pi-ws` uses `c12` v4 to load configuration from config files, package.json, dotenv files, defaults, and environment-derived overrides. Explicit `overrides` passed here take precedence over `PI_WS_*` environment variables.
